query:
-- Outliers com detalhes — os mais extremos
SELECT 
  codigoCetip,
  emissorNome,
  emissorMoodys,
  rating,
  ROUND(scoreMatch, 3) as score,
  ROUND(zspread*10000, 0) as spread_bps,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE isOutlier = 1
ORDER BY universo, rating, zspread DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3TCbxwuMo8bqgEH.3d9f28c4dd9f --database ibSgD3x7K24f8UHUmWHZV3 --execute 
-- Outliers com detalhes — os mais extremos
SELECT 
  codigoCetip,
  emissorNome,
  emissorMoodys,
  rating,
  ROUND(scoreMatch, 3) as score,
  ROUND(zspread*10000, 0) as spread_bps,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE isOutlier = 1
ORDER BY universo, rating, zspread DESC
LIMIT 20;
